meta.title: Alexander Beck — Product Design, AI Product Design, Creative Technology — London
meta.description: Alexander Beck designs product experiences, AI workflows, interaction systems, and creative technology from London.

edge.tagline: A London-based design practice shaping products, interfaces, and interactive moments with a clear point of view, so complex ideas feel precise, human, and quietly inevitable.

items.label: Product Systems
items.tooltip: I turn complex platforms into clear product systems: structure, logic, governance, and decisions that scale.

items.label: Experience Strategy
items.tooltip: I define the journey, priorities, and service logic behind experiences before the interface takes shape.

items.label: Art Direction
items.tooltip: I set the visual, spatial, and motion language so the work feels distinctive, intentional, and unmistakably owned.

items.label: Generative R&D
items.tooltip: I use AI and computational methods to pressure-test ideas, expand directions, and make emerging possibilities concrete.

items.label: Creative Engineering
items.tooltip: I prototype with code, motion, and AI-assisted workflows so teams can see, test, and decide faster.

items.label: Parametric Systems
items.tooltip: I define adaptable rules, variables, and constraints so systems can flex without losing their point of view.

philosophy.textBeforeLink: Innovation happens when different creative disciplines collide. By bringing together design, technology, and storytelling, I create experiences that feel both familiar and entirely new. Precise through constraint, expressive through humanity.

heroLines: I design digital experiences around human response.
portfolio.blurb: A curated selection of product projects across several industries—finance, mobility, digital ventures, and more. Each case shows how I partner with teams to clarify the proposition, shape the interaction, and carry the work through to what actually ships.

cv.title: About me
cv.description: Bots don't deserve nice things; that's why I put this gate up. If I gave you a code, enter it here—otherwise get in touch and I'll send access.

portfolio.title: View Portfolio
portfolio.description: Good work deserves good context. Many of my projects across finance, automotive, and digital innovation startups are NDA-protected, so access is code-gated.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Hit me up for collaborations and job opportunities. If you need innovative thinking and a creative mind to tackle complex aesthetic, visual, and system problems, get in touch.
